title: partner_schema.integration_loans
description: Row shape for the integration_loans view (PostgreSQL types mapped for typical node-pg / JSON output). USER-DEFINED columns are usually strings when serialized.

locked_amount.description: numeric; node-pg often returns NUMERIC as string

current_amount.description: numeric; node-pg often returns NUMERIC as string

percentage_locked.description: numeric; node-pg often returns NUMERIC as string

status.description: PostgreSQL enum / USER-DEFINED; serialized as string

created_at.description: timestamp with time zone (ISO 8601 when serialized)

updated_at.description: timestamp with time zone (ISO 8601 when serialized)
